import json, sys, os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\('.'\), '..', '.env'\)\)

from transcribe import transcribe_video
from summarize import create_summary, save_summary
from build_index import build_index

video = {
    'videoId': 'fHCZCA5oztM',
    'title': '投资TALK君1395期：煤矿里的金丝雀，金融危机再现？聚焦私人信贷',
    'publishedAt': '2026-02-22',
    'channelName': '投资TALK君',
    'channelId': 'talk_yt',
    'duration': 1828,
    'videoUrl': 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fHCZCA5oztM',
    'thumbnailUrl': 'https://img.youtube.com/vi/fHCZCA5oztM/hqdefault.jpg'
}

print\('Step 1: Downloading and transcribing...', file=sys.stderr\)
transcript = transcribe_video\(video['videoUrl']\)
print\(f'Transcription done. Duration: {transcript.get\(\\"duration\\"\)}s, Segments: {len\(transcript.get\(\\"segments\\", []\)\)}', file=sys.stderr\)

print\('Step 2: Summarizing with Claude...', file=sys.stderr\)
summaries_dir = os.path.join\('..', 'data', 'summaries'\)
summary = create_summary\(video, transcript\)
save_summary\(summary, summaries_dir\)

print\('Step 3: Building index...', file=sys.stderr\)
build_index\(\)

print\('Pipeline complete!', file=sys.stderr\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/Users/user1/Documents/TALK君/talk_library" && export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/user1/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Links" && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('.env'\)

from transcribe import transcribe_file
from summarize import create_summary, save_summary
from build_index import build_index
import shutil

filepath = 'data/uploads/0110_free_final.mp4'
filename = '0110_free_final.mp4'
name = os.path.splitext\(filename\)[0]

print\(f'Processing: {filename}'\)
print\(f'[1/3] Transcribing...'\)
transcript = transcribe_file\(filepath\)
print\(f'Transcription done. Duration: {transcript.get\(\\"duration\\"\)}s, Segments: {len\(transcript.get\(\\"segments\\", []\)\)}'\)

print\(f'[2/3] Summarizing...'\)
from datetime import datetime
video_info = {
    'videoId': name,
    'title': name,
    'channelName': '手動上傳',
    'channelId': 'manual',
    'videoUrl': '',
    'thumbnailUrl': '',
    'publishedAt': datetime.now\(\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\)
}
summary = create_summary\(video_info, transcript\)
save_summary\(summary, 'data/summaries'\)

print\(f'[3/3] Rebuilding index...'\)
build_index\(\)

# Sync to site
site_data = os.path.join\('site', 'data'\)
if os.path.exists\(site_data\):
    shutil.rmtree\(site_data\)
shutil.copytree\('data', site_data\)

print\('Done! Refresh the site to see the new summary.'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/Users/user1/Documents/TALK君/talk_library" && export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/user1/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Links" && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, os, shutil
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('.env'\)
from transcribe import transcribe_file
from summarize import create_summary, save_summary
from build_index import build_index
from datetime import datetime

filepath = 'data/uploads/0110_free_final.mp4'
filename = '0110_free_final.mp4'
name = os.path.splitext\(filename\)[0]

print\('[1/3] Transcribing \(with compression\)...'\)
transcript = transcribe_file\(filepath\)
print\(f'Done. Duration: {transcript.get\(\\"duration\\"\)}s, Segments: {len\(transcript.get\(\\"segments\\", []\)\)}'\)

print\('[2/3] Summarizing...'\)
video_info = {
    'videoId': name,
    'title': name,
    'channelName': '手動上傳',
    'channelId': 'manual',
    'videoUrl': '',
    'thumbnailUrl': '',
    'publishedAt': datetime.now\(\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\)
}
summary = create_summary\(video_info, transcript\)
save_summary\(summary, 'data/summaries'\)

print\('[3/3] Rebuilding index & syncing...'\)
build_index\(\)
site_data = os.path.join\('site', 'data'\)
if os.path.exists\(site_data\):
    shutil.rmtree\(site_data\)
shutil.copytree\('data', site_data\)

print\('Done! Refresh http://localhost:8081'\)
" 2>&1)
